home.description: Computer science student at Epitech Paris and San Francisco State University, passionate about web development, mobile/native, devOps and database systems.

me.description: As a student with a passion for IT, I joined Epitech in October 2020 with a view to obtaining a bachelor's degree in computer science in 2023 and a master in computer science in May 2025. I'm currently on exchange at San Francisco State University for the academic year 2023-2024 and I am currently looking for an internship/job in San Francisco for the summer of 2024 or starting in February 2023. My favorite are web development, front end and back end. I also have skills in DevOps, I'm interested in mobile mobile development, especially on the native language side, and I'm also interested in developing database systems. You can find out more about my projects on my github or on the project page of my portfolio. You can find my resume in the header on the top right.

event.vivatech: In 2022, I had the chance to take part in the Vivatech event as a volunteer and to discover many new technologies.
event.hackaton: In 2022, I had the chance to take part in a Hackaton with Bouygues Telecom to find new ways of using their new API to manage accounts and data. My group and I came up with the idea of creating a Discord bot to simplify data access. We finished 3rd in the hackaton.
